title: Deliciously Tender Kenyan Beef Wrap
description: A savory and tender Kenyan dish featuring turmeric and rest meat, perfect for a lazy Sunday, wrapped in a ti leaf wrap, and is flexitarian friendly.
instructions: In a large bowl, mix together turmeric, salt, and black pepper.
Add the beef to the bowl and coat with the turmeric mixture.
Heat the vegetable oil in a large skillet over medium heat.
Add the onion and garlic to the skillet and cook until the onion is translucent.
Add the beef to the skillet and cook until browned on all sides.
Wrap the beef mixture in the ti leaves, making sure to seal the edges.
Place the wrapped beef in the oven and cook for 2 hours.
Remove the beef from the oven and let it rest for 10 minutes.
Serve the beef wrap hot, garnished with fresh herbs if desired.
